description_long: This object consists of a set of three stools, each with a circular top and a single central support. The largest stool features a wide, flat, black surface with a thick, cylindrical base, while the two smaller stools have a natural wood finish with a curvaceous, hourglass-like profile. The wood grain is visible on the smaller stools, adding a touch of organic texture and warmth. The black stool appears sleek and modern, contrasting with the more rustic, natural look of the wooden stools. All three stools have smooth, rounded edges and are designed to be low to the ground, suitable for casual seating in urban parks or public spaces. The set is visually cohesive, blending contemporary and natural elements.
description: A set of three round stools: one large, black, modern stool and two smaller, hourglass-shaped wooden stools with visible grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three stools, with the large black stool in the back and the two smaller wooden stools in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the hourglass-shaped wooden stools and the thickness of the black stool's top.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the large black stool, with only the edges of the wooden stools visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wooden stools' profiles and the black stool's round surface.
